genericExtractionRules: P09 pilot bindings must be reused unchanged rather than regenerated by a weaker generic model.
Every remaining PatternSpec must produce exactly one fixed binding per legacy allowed context domain.
PatternSpec and scenario authorities must agree on template family, KnowledgePoint, semantic signature, equation shape, unknown role and quantity-role bindings.
Every input quantity symbol must become one exact quantity role retaining its legacy semantic role and registered unit dimension.
Every binding must preserve the exact operation signature, legacy constraints, validator reference, ownership model, unit-flow model, realism profile and resolved scenario ID.
Event flow may normalize legacy semantics into input introduction, canonical semantic operation and terminal question, but may not replace the semantic signature or question target.
All candidate bindings must pass the P01 structural and internal-reference validator.
Candidate lifecycle does not imply cross-registry reference admission, human approval, production selection or runtime resolution.
blockingRules: Block unless all 32 P08 G3B-U04 admissions are legacy_authority_normalization candidates.
Block on missing or duplicate PatternSpec, scenario family, domain variant, binding ID, semantic variant ID or language variant ID.
Block on any authority disagreement or unresolved P01 reference.
Block unless P09's four pilot bindings remain byte-equivalent after normalization.
Block unless the combined registry contains exactly 32 PatternSpecs and 117 fixed-domain bindings.
Block on missing legacy constraints, validator, ownership, unit-flow, realism or scenario aliases.
Block if any binding claims approved lifecycle, approved review, production selection or runtime resolution.
Block if the formal approved registry contains any entry.

distance.distanceReduced: all 32 G3B-U04 semantic PatternSpecs are projected into 117 fixed-domain P01-schema candidate bindings with legacy authority parity
remainingBlockers: candidate language and numeric-profile registry admission
